files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added normalize_image_bytes() module-level helper and refactored image_to_base64 to call it (returns encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing); this does touch the mimetype guess line in image_to_base64 so it may conflict with your get_image_mimetype() refactor of that same line
